scripts.prebuild: cd dsp-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --release
scripts.predev: cd dsp-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --release
scripts.wasm:build: cd dsp-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --release
scripts.wasm:dev: cd dsp-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --dev
